title: Dashcam and Bodycam Footage Request -- High Speed Pursuit US 19 May 2025

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all dashcam and bodycam video footage related to a high-speed police pursuit incident that occurred on the morning of May 14, 2025, beginning at the RaceTrac gas station on U.S. 19 in Crystal River, Florida. The suspect, Efton Wanefield Miller, fled deputies in a blue Ford Bronco at high speed southbound on U.S. 19 through Citrus County into Hernando County, where he collided with six vehicles causing serious injury to one driver. The pursuit involved Citrus County Sheriff's Office, Florida Highway Patrol, and Hernando County Sheriff's Office. At one point the suspect attempted to strike a Citrus County deputy with his vehicle during an unrelated traffic stop. Please include all dashcam, bodycam and Computer Aided Dispatch logs from all CCSO units involved. I prefer delivery electronically via download link or email attachment.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Tubester Ltd

title: Dashcam Footage Request -- Vehicle Pursuit Rainbow River July 2024

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all dashcam and bodycam video footage related to a police pursuit incident that occurred on the night of July 6, 2024 in Dunnellon, Florida. The pursuit was initiated by Officer Hannah Patterson following a speeding Kia through the Blue Cove subdivision on Pennsylvania Avenue. The suspect vehicle entered Rainbow River and was found submerged upside down in approximately 30 feet of water. Four occupants were subsequently located hiding under a nearby dock and the driver was charged with fleeing and eluding a law enforcement officer. Please include footage from all responding units including Marion County Sheriff's Office. I am also requesting any associated incident reports and Computer Aided Dispatch logs. I prefer delivery electronically via download link or email attachment.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Tubester Ltd

title: Dashcam Footage Request -- Stolen Vehicle Pursuit November 5 2022

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Georgia Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all dashcam and bodycam video footage related to a police pursuit incident that occurred on November 5, 2022 in Chamblee, Georgia involving a stolen Dodge Ram truck. The incident took place at or near a gas station and involved four police vehicles. The suspect was subsequently arrested and transported to DeKalb County Jail. Please include footage from all responding units. I am also requesting any associated incident reports and Computer Aided Dispatch (CAD) logs for this event. I prefer delivery electronically via download link or email attachment.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tubester Ltd
